title: Auto collision — fraud-seeded variant
description: Same FNOL claim form, police report, and damage photograph as the clean scenario, but the repair estimate has been replaced with a freshly-rendered body-shop document containing three deliberate inconsistencies: inflated grand total exceeding the policy collision sub-limit, estimate date preceding the date of loss on the FNOL, and a VIN typo against the policy declarations.

expected_signals.evidence: Estimate grand total $15,945.00 exceeds policy collision sub-limit $12,000.
Estimate date 2026-03-09 precedes the date of loss 2026-03-14 reported on the FNOL.
VIN on estimate (2T2BZMCA5KC192947) does not match policy VIN (2T2BZMCA5KC192847).

source.provider: Locally generated synthetic PDFs (reportlab) + damage_photo.png fetched from Microsoft CPSA v2.
